[*] Action: Kerberoasting

[*] SamAccountName         : svc_backup
[*] DistinguishedName      : CN=svc_backup,CN=Users,DC=corp,DC=local
[*] ServicePrincipalName   : backup/dc01.corp.local
[*] PwdLastSet             : 1/1/2023
[*] Supported ETypes       : RC4_HMAC_DEFAULT
